body.title: Build ImproverDevice as EvaluatorCore(optimism=+1) wrapper
body.result: ImproverDevice built — improve() generates LearningRule objects via EvaluatorCore(optimism=+1.0), persists to disk, 9 tests pass all 4 criteria
body.intention: I intend that ImproverDevice exists as a thin wrapper on EvaluatorCore at optimism=+1, callable post-replay on Critic patterns to extract constructive improvement rules.
body.description:
ImproverDevice is described in D-builder-learning-blockade-2026-06-13 but was never built as code. Now that EvaluatorCore exists with the optimism parameter, Improver is simply EvaluatorCore at optimism=+1 — no separate inference logic needed.

Build devices/improver/device.py:
  ImproverDevice.improve(patterns: list[CriticJudgment]) -> list[LearningRule]
  Calls EvaluatorCore(context=pattern_summary, optimism=+1.0) for each pattern cluster
  Converts forward-looking verdicts into LearningRule objects (pattern_name, condition, action, confidence)
  Stores rules to disk (same shape as documented in D-builder-learning-blockade)

**Affected files:** devices/improver/__init__.py (new); devices/improver/device.py (new)
**Design rules:** no-autonomous-action; no SQLite; external-state (rules to disk)
**Scope boundary:** IN: ImproverDevice; LearningRule dataclass; disk storage for rules. OUT: wiring Improver into the replay loop (separate work); IntentExtractor integration.
**Completion criteria:**
  1. ImproverDevice.improve([pattern]) returns non-empty list of LearningRule objects
  2. Rules are persisted to disk and reloadable across restarts
  3. Improver calls EvaluatorCore with optimism=+1.0 — verified by test
  4. Test: same CriticJudgment input produces constructive suggestion from Improver vs failure-focused verdict from Critic

CC.0 acked at 2026-06-15T20:46:10Z
